description_long: This is a dark brown glass beer bottle with a long neck and a slightly wider base, typical of many commercial beer bottles. The bottle features a white label on the front, bordered in red at the top, with blue and black text and a small logo. The label is rectangular and covers a portion of the bottle's midsection, leaving the rest of the glass exposed. The bottle is capped with a dark, likely metallic crown cap, which is crimped around the neck. The glass surface appears smooth and glossy, with no visible condensation or additional markings. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for mass-produced beverages.
description: A dark brown glass beer bottle with a white, rectangular label and a crown cap. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and features minimalistic label graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white label with blue and black text and a red border, clearly displaying the main branding and details.
description_view_1: Angled rear view with the label partially visible on the left edge, mostly showing the dark brown glass surface.
description_view_2: Direct rear view with no label visible, only the smooth, dark brown glass of the bottle.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with the label partially visible on the right edge, highlighting the bottle's curvature.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a clean, white background with a red border at the top and blue and black sans-serif text. The design is minimalistic, with a small logo and straightforward typography.
